name: Platform Nine Pantry
concept: Transit-side grab-and-go food counter with a small rotating menu, frequent stock changes, and fragile dependence on hero images and fallback messaging.
audience: Commuters making very fast decisions under time pressure.
locationContext: Rail concourse screen with unreliable live content updates.
brandStory: A simple venue whose runtime quality depends more on resilient fallbacks than on expressive creative direction.
